layout_and_spacing.page_structure: Left vertical sidebar (w-64, border-r, bg-slate-50). Top header for breadcrumbs and global actions (h-16, border-b, bg-white). Main scrollable content area.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Control Room grid: Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.cards: Flat design. NO soft shadows. Use border-slate-200. rounded-sm or rounded-none. h-full for grid items.
layout_and_spacing.kanban: Horizontal flex container with gap-6. Columns are w-80 shrink-0 bg-slate-50 p-4 rounded-sm. Cards inside are bg-white border border-slate-200 p-4.

components.tables: Dense. text-sm. Hover states on rows (hover:bg-slate-50). Border-collapse.
components.forms: Inputs use rounded-sm, border-slate-200. Focus rings must use primary color (#002FA7). Labels are uppercase tracking-wider text-xs font-semibold text-zinc-500.
components.badges: Square or rounded-sm, 1px border. No pill shapes.
components.dialogs: backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/40. Modal itself is flat bg-white, 1px border, 0 shadow.

media.description: For CRM leads, contact table, or agent persona avatars
For client companies in CRM or knowledge base sources

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Must explicitly set hover text and bg colors. Lighter hue of active state. E.g., hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-zinc-950.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Fast and snappy. transition-all duration-150 ease-out.
interactions_and_motion.focus: All interactive elements MUST have focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:outline-none).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use APCA guidelines.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='create-campaign-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all Shadcn components are modified to reflect the Swiss Brutalist/High-Contrast theme (remove roundness where possible, set rounded-sm max, remove heavy shadows, use flat borders).
Build the dashboard using a fixed left sidebar and scrolling main content area.
Implement real-time configurable UI. Use state management for Persona tools, CRM drag-and-drop, and n8n webhook configs.
Do not use generic placeholder images. Use the provided headshots for the CRM leads and Avatars.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural complex layouts like Kanban boards, customizing Shadcn's basic elements within it.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL buttons, inputs, tabs, and critical UI elements.
